mappings.description: List of mappings to match against the user ID token. By default only the first matching mapping is applied; set `union_roles: true` to apply the union of all matching mappings.

schema.description: JSON schema to match against the user ID token.

roles.description: Names of roles to assign to the user if the schema matches.

admin.description: Admin flag the mapping votes for if its schema matches. With `union_roles` unset or false, only the first matching mapping applies and its `admin` value alone is used; the default is no admin, so omitting `admin` (or setting it to null) grants no admin permissions, and because the flag is written on every login a matched user is demoted if they previously had admin. With `union_roles: true` (Quilt Platform 1.69+) this is tri-state: omitted (or null) is a non-vote, `true` grants admin, `false` vetoes admin; the user becomes admin only if some matching mapping votes `true` and none vote `false`. Platforms before 1.69 reject an explicit null.

default_role.description: The default role to assign if none of the mappings match.

union_roles.description: When true, login assigns the union of roles from all matching mappings (users switch among them via the role switcher) instead of stopping at the first match. The `admin` flag becomes a tri-state vote (see `mappings[].admin`). Defaults to false, preserving first-match-wins behavior. Requires Quilt Platform 1.69+; older platforms silently ignore this key and stay in first-match mode.
